question: Which papers use datasets whose natural language is English?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181022 ?dataType . ?dataType orkgp:P181025 ?language . ?language rdfs:label ?languageLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?languageLabel)), "english")) OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

question: Which papers provide a dataset URL that contains GitHub?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181028 ?location . ?location orkgp:P1003 ?url . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?url)), "github")) OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel LIMIT 10

question: Which papers tackle a classification NLP task?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181003 ?task . ?task orkgp:P181004 ?taskType . ?taskType rdfs:label ?taskTypeLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?taskTypeLabel)), "classification")) OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

question: What is the minimum number of data sources reported in NLP4RE datasets?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT (MIN(xsd:decimal(?numSources)) AS ?minDataSources) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181017 ?source . ?source orkgp:P181019 ?numSources . }

question: What is the average number of annotators reported across NLP4RE studies?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT (AVG(xsd:decimal(?numAnnotators)) AS ?avgAnnotators) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annotation . ?annotation orkgp:P181032 ?annotator . ?annotator orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotators . }

question: What is the average measured agreement reported across NLP4RE annotation studies?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT (AVG(xsd:decimal(?agreement)) AS ?avgMeasuredAgreement) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annotation . ?annotation orkgp:P181041 ?agreementProcess . ?agreementProcess orkgp:P181045 ?agreement . }

question: Which papers are among those with the highest reported numbers of annotators?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181031 ?annotation . ?annotation orkgp:P181032 ?annotator . ?annotator orkgp:P59120 ?numAnnotators . OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel } } ORDER BY DESC(xsd:decimal(?numAnnotators)) ?paperLabel LIMIT 5

question: Which papers are among those with the largest reported datasets by number of data items?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:license ?license . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?license orkgp:P181027 ?licenseType . } OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel

question: Which papers report datasets released under a CC-BY license?
gold_sparql: PREFIX orkgr: <http://orkg.org/orkg/resource/> PREFIX orkgc: <http://orkg.org/orkg/class/> PREFIX orkgp: <http://orkg.org/orkg/predicate/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT DISTINCT ?paper ?paperLabel WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution a orkgc:C121001 . ?contribution orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:license ?license . ?license orkgp:P181027 ?licenseType . ?licenseType rdfs:label ?licenseTypeLabel . FILTER(REGEX(LCASE(STR(?licenseTypeLabel)), "cc[- ]?by")) OPTIONAL { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel } } ORDER BY ?paperLabel LIMIT 10

question: Which papers are among those with the highest reported measured agreement values?
